description: Code-level flow sequences for top 5 critical journeys

steps.label: handleSubmit fires on form onSubmit
await login(email, password) called from useAuth()
login useCallback invokes apiLogin(email, password)
login() calls apiFetch POST /Auth/login with {email, password}
POST /Auth/login: query partners WHERE email=$1 AND employee=true
bcrypt.compare(password, employee.password_hash) returns 401 on mismatch
resolvePermissions(employee.id) queries group_permissions + employee_location_scope
jwt.sign(tokenPayload, JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '24h' }) returns {token, user, permissions}
localStorage.setItem('tgclinic_token', res.token) persists JWT
dispatchAuthChange(res.permissions.locations) fires tgclinic:auth-change CustomEvent
handleAuthChange listener receives locations: setAllowedLocations + setSelectedLocationId
ProtectedRoute re-renders: isAuthenticated=true renders Layout; navigate('/') resolves to Overview
useAppointments(selectedLocationId) provides advanceCheckIn to the page
CustomerProfile renders appointment list; receptionist clicks advance-status button
advanceCheckIn(appointmentId) looks up current checkInStatus in CHECK_IN_FLOW_ORDER
Maps nextStatus to apiState: 'arrived' maps to 'confirmed', 'done' maps to 'done'
await apiUpdateAppointment(appointmentId, { state: apiState })
updateAppointment(id, data) calls apiFetch PUT /Appointments/:id with Bearer token
requireAuth middleware verifies JWT, sets req.user
PUT /Appointments/:id: requirePermission('appointments.edit') then UPDATE appointments SET state
setAppointments local optimistic update: checkInStatus to nextStatus, arrivalTime = now
handleCreateAppointment(data: AppointmentFormData) callback wired to CustomerProfile
await createAppointment({customerId, doctorId, locationId, date, startTime}) from useAppointments
createAppointment useCallback builds ApiAppointment payload (partnerid, doctorid, companyid, state: 'scheduled')
await apiCreateAppointment(apiPayload) delegates to api.ts
createAppointment(data) calls apiFetch POST /Appointments with Bearer token
requireAuth validates Bearer JWT; requirePermission('appointments.add') checks DB group_permissions
POST /Appointments: validates UUIDs, date, state; checks FK existence (partners, companies, employees)
Generates name 'AP000001' via MAX sequence; INSERT INTO appointments RETURNING *
Re-fetches with JOINs (partner, company, doctor); returns 201 with full appointment row
mapApiToManagedAppointment(created) then setAppointments([...prev, managed]) updates local state
handleMakePayment(data: PaymentFormData) callback from CustomerProfile PaymentForm onSubmit
await addPayment({customerId, amount, method, recordId, recordType}) from useCustomerPayments
addPayment useCallback calls createPayment() from api.ts
createPayment(data) calls apiFetch POST /Payments; maps camelCase to snake_case body fields
requirePermission('payment.edit') checks employee group_permissions + overrides in DB
POST /Payments: validates customer_id, amount, method; begins DB transaction
INSERT INTO payments (...) RETURNING * within transaction
If record_type='saleorder': UPDATE saleorders SET residual = GREATEST(0, residual - amount); or dotkham amountresidual
COMMIT; returns 201 with payment row
setPayments([created, ...prev]) optimistic prepend to local state
refetchProfile() + refetchPayments() + loadDeposits(customerId) refresh all profile data
User clicks a location option in dropdown; onChange(location.id) fires
setSelectedLocationId(id) in LocationProvider updates shared context state
useLocationFilter() consumers (Customers, Calendar, Employees, Overview, Payment) re-render with new selectedLocationId
useCustomers(locationId) re-runs effect: fetchPartners({companyId: locationId}) calls GET /Partners?company_id=X
fetchPartners({companyId}) calls apiFetch GET /Partners?company_id=X with Bearer token
GET /Partners: WHERE companyid=$1 filter applied; returns paginated partner rows
setCustomers(items.map(mapPartnerToCustomer)) page re-renders with filtered customer list
Fan-out: all other pages with useLocationFilter() receive same selectedLocationId and re-filter independently
